summary: Recent updates to the decoder platform backends in Firefox streamline the handling of media configurations, particularly for H.265 video streams. By stopping the check for a non-zero number of Sequence Parameter Sets (SPS) when comparing extra data, the process of managing video configurations becomes more efficient. Additionally, the introduction of tests ensures that configurations without SPS are correctly validated for equality. These changes are significant as they enhance video playback capabilities, particularly for users on Android devices, where improving media codec performance is crucial in delivering a smooth viewing experience. **This work will ultimately lead to better handling of various video formats, ensuring users have a more reliable and high-quality media experience.**
